heading: Security
label: 30909 Security
text: Neither the United States nor a federally-owned corporation may be required to give a bond or admiralty stipulation in a civil action under this chapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3090946 App.:743 (last sentence).(last sentence), ; , , .Mar. 9, 1920, ch. 95, § 341 Stat. 526Pub. L. 97–31, § 12(25)(A)95 Stat. 155Aug. 6, 1981The words “civil action” are substituted for “proceeding” for consistency in this chapter and with rule 2 of the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure (28 App. U.S.C.).
